subject: A glowing green chalk outline of a body on stone pavement, viewed from above
description: A top-down perspective looks down at grey stone tile pavement where a luminous green chalk outline traces the shape of a humanoid body — the classic crime-scene silhouette, rendered here with a magical glow. A small arrow outline also appears within the body trace. At the edges of the frame: a wide-brimmed hat and a hand reaching down (a detective crouching to examine the scene), a pair of boots at the top, and what appears to be a small scaled creature at the lower left. The overall palette is grey stone and bright neon-green.
foreground: Glowing green chalk body outline on stone tile; a detective's hand reaching down
background: Stone tile pavement extending out of frame
emotion: clinical investigation; the detective studies the evidence
